holdings.infoBox: BGDV is an equity ETF with a total of 54 individual holdings. The top holdings are Western Digital stock at 5.39%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 5.30%, Broadcom at 4.82%, Eli Lilly and Company at 4.24%, and Alphabet at 3.35%.

overview.description: The Bahl & Gaynor Dividend ETF (BGDV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in dividend-paying US companies of any market capitalization. The fund seeks long-term growth of dividend income, downside protection, and total return. BGDV was launched on Dec 11, 2024 and is issued by Bahl & Gaynor.
